title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Queen Elizabeth II Cup is just about to start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, just before the race, Daiwa Scarlet
learns that Vodka is dropping out due to health
concerns.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She resolves to put on such an impressive
performance that the crowd will forget Vodka
ever existed.
